title: The National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
body:
Hi, Let's say The National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) wanted to provide you all a grant to work on this full time, and make it an industry standard.

Would you be interested in this?  

The fragmentation of containers is causing a lot of confusion in the market around hosting, security, and scalability.  

Also, does this project support file journal replication?  To replicate containers to other enviroments?

comments.body:
please write about the possible grant to security@lists.podman.io.

What do you mean about file journal replication?  You can use podman container [checkpoint|restore] to replicate a container to another machine.
